title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
Save IDBI Bank WhatsApp Banking Number: 88600 45678 and start interacting with your Bank on WhatsApp with “Hi” 
  * Bank is always ‘Available’ – 24/7 x 365 (even on holidays!)
  * You don’t have to be a customer with IDBI Bank. We can still be friends.








Just Say “Hi” to 88600 45678 and start Chatting with Us. We shall continue to add more services for your Convenience.
